sections.paragraph:
verb לרשת

to net, cover with netting; network

verb רושת

be netted, covered with netting; be networked

verb להתרשת

become netted, covered with netting; be networked

verb להרשית

to score a goal

verb לרשת (>>רישת)

to net, cover with netting

feminine noun

net, snare, trap, web, grid, lattice, mesh, netting, plexus, screen, gauze

feminine noun

network (communication)

feminine noun

chain (in business)
